creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: koobs
Date: Mon Jan 27 12:21:18 2014
New Revision: 341387
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/341387
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r341387/

Log:
  www/py-requests: Update to 2.2.1, Enable STAGE & AUTOPLIST support
  
  - Update to 2.2.1
  - Enable STAGE support
  - Enable AUTOPLIST support
  - Deprecate easy_install target
  - Add CONFLICTS against www/py-requests1
  
  PR:		ports/185631
  Submitted by:	olivierd

Deleted:
  head/www/py-requests/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/www/py-requests/Makefile
  head/www/py-requests/distinfo

Modified: head/www/py-requests/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-requests/Makefile	Mon Jan 27 12:19:23 2014	(r341386)
+++ head/www/py-requests/Makefile	Mon Jan 27 12:21:18 2014	(r341387)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	requests
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.3
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.1
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -13,10 +13,12 @@ COMMENT=	HTTP library written in Python 
 LICENSE=	ISCL
 
 USE_PYTHON=		yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+CONFLICTS_INSTALL=	py*-requests1-*
 
 regression-test: build
 	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${PYTHON_CMD} test_requests.py
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/www/py-requests/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-requests/distinfo	Mon Jan 27 12:19:23 2014	(r341386)
+++ head/www/py-requests/distinfo	Mon Jan 27 12:21:18 2014	(r341387)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (requests-1.2.3.tar.gz) = 156bf3ec27ba9ec7e0cf8fbe02808718099d218de403eb64a714d73ba1a29ab1
-SIZE (requests-1.2.3.tar.gz) = 348854
+SHA256 (requests-2.2.1.tar.gz) = 1266921f1bed5fbf364cd83cf239b6d7b3ea5c32ccccbc93980d9ba12cdcfd02
+SIZE (requests-2.2.1.tar.gz) = 421978
